features: 3 in 1 FORMULATION: Nuage Micellar Cleansing Wipes, formulated to remove make-up, cleanse and hydrate skin. Enriched with Aloe Vera, Vitamin E and Chamomile Flower Extract to soothe face, eyes and lips. Suitable for all skin types.
FREE FROM: Nuage Micellar Cleansing Wipes, perfect to cleanse thoroughly daily, free from parabens, colours and perfume.

WIPE IT ALL AWAY: Micellar Water is made up of Micelles - tiny balls of cleansing oil molecules suspended in soft water, which will grab onto the skin and pull away impurities cleaning skin thoroughly.

EVERY DAY: Include the Nuage Micellar Cleansing Wipes into your daily skin care routine to keep skin feeling clean, soft and hydrated. No need to rinse after use. Monthly after cleansing, boost your skin care routine, use a Nuage Micellar Face Mask and relax for 15 minutes.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Reasealable pack, 30 wipes
description: Product Description Nuage Micellar Cleansing Wipes, formulated to remove make-up, cleanse and hydrate skin. Enriched with Aloe Vera, Vitamin E and Chamomile Flower Extract to soothe face, eyes and lips. Suitable for all skin types. Nuage Micellar Cleansing Wipes, perfect to cleanse thoroughly daily, free from parabens, colours and perfume. Reasealable pack, 30 wipes. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs. Dispose of used wipes properly; do not flush.
